identity.name: ThookAI
identity.description: The Personal AI Creative Agency. A multi-agent system that clones your voice and scales your creative output.
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism) x Electric & Neon (Future)

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. If Clash Display is unavailable via CDN, fallback to Outfit (Google Fonts).

body.family: Plus Jakarta Sans, DM Sans, sans-serif
body.usage: Main UI text, paragraphs, and long-form content.

mono.usage: Code snippets, API keys, data values in dashboards.

primary.description: Acid Lime. Use sparingly for primary CTAs (Create, Publish, Upgrade).

secondary.description: Electric Violet. Use for 'AI Magic' moments, Persona Engine indicators, and gradients.

accent.description: Cyberpunk accents for graphs, tags, and status indicators.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B8E600] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,255,0,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2

cards.base: bg-[#0F0F10] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-6 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-[#18181B] border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4FF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4FF00] text-white rounded-lg h-12 px-4 placeholder:text-neutral-600

navigation.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#050505] border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-50
navigation.topbar: h-16 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 sticky top-0 z-40

gradients.card_hover: radial-gradient(800px circle at var(--mouse-x) var(--mouse-y), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06), transparent 40%)

visual_enhancers.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

images.alt: Abstract purple neon flow - use for Hero Section background or 'AI Brain' visualization
Creator with sparklers - use for 'Persona Card' or Creator Profile demo
Dark modern desk setup - use for 'Agency Workspace' or 'Studio' features
Pink/Orange streaks - use for 'Viral Hook' or 'Analytics' accent backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: In `tailwind.config.js`, ensure `darkMode: ['class']` is set, but default the `html` tag to have class `dark` or set background to #050505 manually in global css.
NO DEFAULT BORDERS: Avoid standard grey borders. Use `border-white/5` or `border-white/10` for a premium, subtle look.
COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components. Remove the default rounded-md and use `rounded-lg` or `rounded-xl`. Change primary button color to #D4FF00 with black text.
LAYOUT STRATEGY: Use the 'Shell' concept for the Content Studio. The center should be the 'Canvas' (mimicking LinkedIn/X/IG), left is 'Tools/Agents', right is 'Preview/Feedback'.
PERSONA ENGINE: Visualise the 'Persona' not just as a form, but as a 'Digital Card' with the creator's avatar and a 'Voice Fingerprint' graphic (use the abstract neon images for this).
ANIMATION: Add `framer-motion` for page transitions. Use `AnimatePresence` for switching between Studio modes.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use Bento grids.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
